ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-01-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Amanda Ebey appearing for petitioner Alisa Winchel.
The court stated that the certified copies of the San Diego letters had been filed and also indicated that counsel would need to file an amendment to change the distribution from John's heirs to John's estate. The court approved the preliminary distribution to the 2 other heirs and set the matter for status for the filing of the final distribution and acounting to 11/05/07. If the petition is filed, no appearance is required. The court will modify the order.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Bailiff: Rob Harris Clerk: Rosie Noguera
